_comment: MANUAL OVERRIDE FILE — Homepage + featured content control.
_purpose: Force specific content to appear (or not appear) in homepage and featured-coverage surfaces regardless of what autopilot selects. Phase 1 doesn't yet rotate homepage automatically, but the override file is created now so future phases can respect it from day one.

homepage_lead_story.reason: When active, force this article as the homepage lead regardless of autopilot ranking.

pinned_featured_articles.reason: Slugs here will always be included in FEATURED_ARTICLES top of list.

suppressed_articles.reason: Slugs here will never be selected by autopilot for featured/homepage surfaces. Use for articles that are outdated or problematic but shouldn't be deleted yet.
